import React, { useState } from 'react' import {Container, LogoContainer, Menu, MobileIcon, Wrapper, DropDownContent, DropDownLi, StyledSubMenu, SubMenu } from './Narbar.elements'; import {FaBars, FaTimes} from "react-icons/fa"; import { IconContext } from 'react-icons'; import styled from 'styled-components'; // Importa styled-components import { FaIcon } from 'react-icons/fa'; // Importa el icono que desees utilizar const Icon = styled.span` position: absolute; left: 10px; top: 50%; transform: translateY(-50%); `; const Navbar = () => { const [showMobileMenu, setShowMobileMenu] = useState(false); return ( setShowMobileMenu(!showMobileMenu)}> { showMobileMenu ? : }
